caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain, dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top with floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the front of her garment. Throughout the sequence, her facial expressions and mouth movements change as she speaks, transitioning from a closed-mouth expression to a smile and then back to speaking. In the bottom left corner of each shot, there is a small logo featuring a golden emblem and the text "NPTEL". The camera remains in a static medium shot, focusing on her from the waist up, with no other people or objects visible in the scene.
